<?php namespace Aws\SageMakerMetrics; use Aws\AwsClient; /** * This client is used to interact with the **Amazon SageMaker Metrics Service** service. * @method \Aws\Result batchGetMetrics(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise batchGetMetricsAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result batchPutMetrics(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise batchPutMetricsAsync(array $args = []) */ class SageMakerMetricsClient extends AwsClient {}
